subcodes.first_line: This is a Book which the All-Merciful hath sent down in days wherein the raven croaked and the clamor of swine and barking arose [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن فی ایام فیها نعب الغراب و ارتفع قباع الخنازیر و نباح
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
